name: [GRIDHAND] SMS Campaign Agent - Trigger: unpaid invoice 7 days → escalating SMS reminders

gridhand.scenario: Trigger: unpaid invoice 7 days → escalating SMS reminders
gridhand.description: When an unpaid invoice reaches 7 days overdue, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a series of escalating SMS reminders to the customer via Twilio, starting with a friendly notification on day 7, followed by a more urgent message on day 10, and a final notice on day 14, all while updating the customer's record in QuickBooks and notifying the business owner via email. This automated reminder process saves the business owner time and reduces the likelihood of late payments, allowing them to focus on serving their customers and growing their business. By streamlining the invoicing process, the business owner can expect to see an improvement in cash flow and a reduction in outstanding balances, with GRIDHAND handling the tedious follow-up tasks.
